chunks.description: Main collection storing processed medical dialogue chunks with embeddings

content.description: Raw text content used for embedding generation
content.example:
What are the symptoms of diabetes?

Context: Patient is a 45-year-old male with family history of diabetes.

Diabetes symptoms include increased thirst, frequent urination, unexplained weight loss, fatigue, blurred vision, and slow-healing sores.

parent_id.description: ID of the original document this chunk came from

sequence.description: Sequence number of this chunk within the parent document

total_chunks.description: Total number of chunks for this parent document

content_type.description: Type of content in this chunk

task.description: Task type for this medical dialogue

chunk_length.description: Character length of the chunk content

token_count.description: Number of tokens in the chunk content

created_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the chunk was created

question.example: What are the symptoms of diabetes?

context.example: Patient is a 45-year-old male with family history of diabetes.

answer.example: Diabetes symptoms include increased thirst, frequent urination, unexplained weight loss, fatigue, blurred vision, and slow-healing sores.

embedding.description: Vector embedding for semantic search (768 dimensions)

sample_documents.content:
What are the symptoms of diabetes?

Context: Patient is a 45-year-old male with family history of diabetes.

Diabetes symptoms include increased thirst, frequent urination, unexplained weight loss, fatigue, blurred vision, and slow-healing sores.

metadata.question: What are the symptoms of diabetes?
metadata.context: Patient is a 45-year-old male with family history of diabetes.
metadata.answer: Diabetes symptoms include increased thirst, frequent urination, unexplained weight loss, fatigue, blurred vision, and slow-healing sores.

sample_documents.content:
I have been experiencing chest pain for the past week. The pain is sharp and occurs mainly when I breathe deeply or cough.

Context: 32-year-old female, non-smoker, no previous cardiac history.

Chest pain can have various causes. Given your symptoms and age, it's important to rule out serious conditions like pleurisy, costochondritis, or even cardiac issues. I recommend immediate evaluation with chest X-ray and ECG.

metadata.question: I have been experiencing chest pain for the past week. The pain is sharp and occurs mainly when I breathe deeply or cough.
metadata.context: 32-year-old female, non-smoker, no previous cardiac history.
metadata.answer: Chest pain can have various causes. Given your symptoms and age, it's important to rule out serious conditions like pleurisy, costochondritis, or even cardiac issues. I recommend immediate evaluation with chest X-ray and ECG.
